headline: Affordable Housing Shortage Reaches 960,000 Units Nationwide
context: Ministry of Housing reported cumulative affordable housing deficit of 960,000 units nationally in 2025.

cards.big: Affordable housing deficit reaches 960,000 units nationally in 2025
cards.sub: KL and Selangor account for 420,000 units of the shortfall

cards.big: PR1MA delivered only 38,000 of 500,000 promised units since 2013 launch
cards.sub: Programme restructured in 2024 after RM2.8 billion in losses and failures

cards.big: Median house price in KL at RM550,000 is 8.2 times median annual income
cards.sub: World Bank considers anything above 5.1 times income severely unaffordable

cards.big: PPR waitlist has 180,000 applicants with average wait time of 6.5 years
cards.sub: New PPR construction of 8,000 units per year cannot match 25,000 annual applications

cards.big: Housing shortfall tests whether affordability is a planning goal or a market afterthought
960,000 affordable housing units short. The market alone will never close a gap this structural.
